---
title: ""
number-sections: false
numbered: false
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
    toc: false
  pdf:
    title-block-style: none
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\small\textbf{Palabras clave:} Ciencia Social Abierta
\normalsize
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
<style>
nav#TOC { display: none !important; }
div[data-when-format="pdf"] { display: none !important; }
</style>
# Abstract {.unnumbered}

<font size="4">aquí va el abstract</font>

<br>

::: {.keywords-box}
<span style="font-size: 1.1em;"><strong>Palabras clave:</strong> Ciencia Social Abierta, Ultraderecha, Comportamiento Electoral, Autoritarismo,
Confianza institucional, Intolerancia política, Meritocracia, Reticencia al cambio.</span>
:::

---
